stories.title: Configure HikariCP connection pool
stories.description: As a DevOps engineer, I want explicit database connection pool settings so that production performance is predictable.
acceptanceCriteria: application.yml contains HikariCP section with maximum-pool-size=20, minimum-idle=5, idle-timeout=30000
Application starts successfully with HikariCP configuration
HikariDataSource bean has correct pool properties

stories.title: Restrict CORS allowed headers
stories.description: As a security engineer, I want CORS configuration to only allow specific headers so that the API is not overly permissive.
acceptanceCriteria: SecurityConfig.java restricts allowedHeaders to: Accept, Content-Type, Authorization, X-Requested-With, X-Trace-Id
SecurityConfigTest.java has test for allowed headers returning 200
SecurityConfigTest.java has test for forbidden headers returning 403

stories.title: Optimize getLastApproval() from O(n) to O(1)
stories.description: As a developer, I want O(1) retrieval of the last approval by replacing reduce() with direct list access.
acceptanceCriteria: Timesheet.getLastApproval() uses approvals.get(approvals.size() - 1) instead of reduce()
Method handles empty list with Optional.empty()
Method maintains same return type Optional<Approval>

stories.title: Add EntityGraph annotation to TimesheetRepository
stories.description: As a developer, I want to prevent N+1 queries by adding @EntityGraph for approvals relationship.

stories.title: Add @Version to TimesheetJpaEntity
stories.description: As a developer, I want optimistic locking on TimesheetJpaEntity by adding @Version field.
acceptanceCriteria: TimesheetJpaEntity has @Version private Long version field
Getter and setter for version field added

stories.title: Add @Version to Course entity
stories.description: As a developer, I want optimistic locking on Course entity by adding @Version field.
acceptanceCriteria: Course.java has @Version private Long version field
Getter and setter for version field added

stories.title: Create TimesheetValidationService interface
stories.description: As a developer, I want a domain service interface for timesheet validation so that validation logic is separated from entity.
acceptanceCriteria: TimesheetValidationService interface created in domain/service package

stories.title: Implement TimesheetValidationService with externalized properties
stories.description: As a developer, I want validation service to use TimesheetValidationProperties instead of magic numbers.
acceptanceCriteria: Service validates hours against min/max from properties
Service validates rate against min/max from properties

stories.title: Create BusinessRuleException for domain errors
stories.description: As a developer, I want a domain-specific exception so that business rule violations are distinct from generic errors.
acceptanceCriteria: BusinessRuleException class created in exception package
Exception has constructor with message parameter
Exception has constructor with message and cause parameters

stories.title: Add BusinessRuleException handler to GlobalExceptionHandler
stories.description: As a developer, I want GlobalExceptionHandler to handle BusinessRuleException with 400 status and proper error response.
acceptanceCriteria: Handler returns ApiErrorResponse with exception message
Handler logs exception at WARN level

stories.title: Add RateLimitingFilter threshold test
stories.description: As a QA engineer, I want a test for rate limiting threshold behavior so that the feature is verified.
acceptanceCriteria: RateLimitingFilterTest has test for requests at threshold limit (exactly 100)
Test verifies 200 OK response at threshold

stories.title: Fix UserEntityTest timestamp test with Clock injection
stories.description: As a QA engineer, I want deterministic timestamps in UserEntityTest so that tests pass consistently.
acceptanceCriteria: UserEntityTest uses Clock.fixed() for time-dependent tests
Test uses Instant.now(Clock) instead of Instant.now()
Test verifies createdAt timestamp matches fixed clock
Test verifies updatedAt is strictly after createdAt

stories.title: Add Javadoc to TimesheetController public methods
stories.description: As a developer, I want comprehensive Javadoc on TimesheetController so that API behavior is documented.
acceptanceCriteria: All public methods in TimesheetController have Javadoc

stories.title: Add Javadoc to ApprovalController public methods
stories.description: As a developer, I want comprehensive Javadoc on ApprovalController so that API behavior is documented.
acceptanceCriteria: All public methods in ApprovalController have Javadoc

stories.title: Create API overview documentation
stories.description: As a frontend developer, I want an API overview document so that I understand the system endpoints.
acceptanceCriteria: Document includes API base URL and versioning
Document includes link to OpenAPI spec
